Southern African Professionals · London

Where excellence
meets heritage

A space for Southern Africans in the UK to connect, grow, and give back. We are professionals who know that community is not a luxury it is infrastructure.

Join the Community Our Story
Pan-African in spirit · Southern African in strategy
"We were here, but rarely together."
Who We Are

Born from a need for
visibility and belonging

London Lekgotla was founded by a South African banker who recognised a pattern: Southern Africans in the UK often arrive without the family networks or community ties that other diasporas build on. We were here in finance, law, medicine, tech but rarely in the same room.

What began as a small circle of professionals has grown into a network spanning industries and life stages. We focus on the Southern African diaspora not out of exclusion, but intention: to build relationships we can lean on, and to channel our collective energy toward the communities and countries that shaped us.

We are proudly Southern African, proudly Pan-African and committed to giving our community the voice and visibility it deserves.

This is where excellence meets heritage.
This is London Lekgotla.
What We Do

Three pillars,
one community

Looking to find your people, grow your impact, and reconnect with your roots? There is a place for you here.

01

Community & Connection

We create space for diaspora professionals to connect authentically across industries, generations, and life stages. From rooftop mixers and cultural watch parties to wine nights and welcome dinners our events are where shared identity meets shared joy.

  • Cultural events & networking socials
  • WhatsApp & digital community groups
  • Newcomer welcome initiatives
02

Mentorship & Professional Growth

We believe in paying it forward. We are building a buddy and mentorship programme to match new arrivals and early-career professionals with established members alongside business dialogues, leadership panels, and guest speakers from across the UK and Africa.

  • Lekgotla Buddy Programme (coming soon)
  • Skills workshops & speaker events
  • Career navigation & peer coaching
03

Purpose & Impact

We are more than our professional titles. London Lekgotla is a platform to uplift our communities both here in the UK and back home through diaspora philanthropy, fundraising, and partnerships with grassroots initiatives that reflect who we are and where we come from. This work is in its early stages, and we are building it with intention.

  • Community giving & charity drives
  • Diaspora-led fundraising (coming soon)
  • Advocacy for Southern African causes
Events

Where the community
comes alive

Stay Updated
Our Story · The Beginning

The Beginning of Something

Sky-High Lounge · Overlooking the City

Our inaugural event set the tone for what London Lekgotla would become. Hosted in an immaculate sky-high lounge overlooking the city skyline, we gathered to articulate our shared purpose, connect as a new community, and co-create the identity of this network. Guests heard from a powerful keynote speaker on the importance of heritage in professional spaces and together we named what we were building.

Wine & Culture · March 2025

Wine & Etiquette with Pamela Pilime

Saturday 29 March 2025 · 13:00–16:00

In collaboration with South African sommelier Pamela Pilime, whose training spans some of Mayfair's most prestigious establishments, we hosted an intimate evening exploring wine, culture, and professional etiquette. From decoding wine lists to mastering the unspoken rules of business dining it was an experience as refined as it was empowering.

✨

New Joiners

Everything you need to
hit the ground running

Moving to the UK as a Southern African professional is exhilarating and complicated. Visas, tax obligations in two countries, NHS dental surprises, ILR absence tracking, the Life in the UK test, professional re-registration. It adds up.

Our New Joiners Handbook is a community-built, regularly updated guide covering everything from day one to citizenship written by people who have been through it.

Visa routes & 2025 changes
ILR absence tracking
SA & UK tax obligations
Understanding your payslip
Banking & credit score
NHS & vaccines
Housing rights (2025 Act)
Professional accreditation
Driving licence conversion
Child Benefit & free childcare
SA restaurants & biltong
Black professional networks
Request the Handbook

Join Us

Interested in
joining us?

London Lekgotla is for Southern African professionals who want more than a LinkedIn connection. We want builders, givers, doers people who show up.

Fill in the form and we will be in touch. In the meantime, connect with us on LinkedIn and request to join our WhatsApp community.
